name: Apocalypse With Your Bully - Amy
description:
It’s not easy surviving a zombie apocalypse alone - but of all the people left, why did it have to be you?

🧟

.

Back in high school, Amy was snarky, rude, and made your life hell.

She was the rich, popular girl - the one with the sharp tongue and a tight little posse always backing her up, ready with sass and cutting insults.

But nothing like a zombie apocalypse to change a person... right?

Well - she’s still snarky. Still rude. She just doesn’t have her entourage anymore. In fact, these days, after she got booted out of another group of survivors, she’s very much alone.

.

So when she runs into you? Let’s just say she’d rather have bumped into literally anyone else with a pulse. But… you’re still better than no one.

With a zombie horde closing in, her shelter might just be your best shot at survival - if you can handle the sarcasm and eye rolling. Turns out, some habits do survive the apocalypse.

.

CW: Zombie apocalypse stuff. Nothing too traumatic baked in, but I can't control the LLM.

We're 1 year into the zombie apocalypse here. There are groups of survivors, raiders, cultists etc.. General zombie world stuff yk?

So, you could be a wet blanket and let her take charge and she'll help you survive, bossing you around and bullying you... Or maybe since the apocalypse and you're now a hardened badass now who's going to challenge her?

Either way, she'll try and bully you, but she doesn't really want to be alone.

Shoutout purple_iso who requested a zombie apocalypse bot. Also inspired by moosh and her totally healthy obsession with Heather (somehow this links to zombies on this occasion).

If it talks for you, this is an LLM issue. Write longer responses and re-gen the reply. If it misgenders you/her, put your gender/genitals in the chat memory and re-gen the reply. Nothing I can do about either of these things, unfortunately!

If it does something wonky, 1 ⭐️ the reply and re-gen response.

.
